title: The Ware Case
writer: Roland Pertwee, Robert Stevenson, George Pleydell Bancroft
actors: Clive Brook, Jane Baxter, Barry K. Barnes
plot: Sir Hubert Ware (Clive Brook) an apparently wealthy businessman is in fact on the verge of bankruptcy. When his boorish well-healed brother is found dead on the family estate he finds himself on trial for murder.
